welcome.expoTitle: Welcome to SNOMED International's Expo 2025 Quick Assessment
welcome.expoDescription: This is a quick assessment version designed for Expo 2025. You'll complete a streamlined evaluation focusing on the most critical Key Process Area for your stakeholder type. This brief assessment provides immediate insights into your SNOMED CT implementation maturity and will be automatically saved to our Expo 2025 database for collective analysis.
welcome.analyzeHint: Analyze a collection of assessment results
welcome.uploadHint: Upload an assessment to edit or view results

stakeholderSelect.heading: SNOMED Implementation Maturity assessment
stakeholderSelect.expoModeInfo: Expo Mode: Stakeholder name, user name, and location are required fields for Expo 2025 assessments. This information will be stored and showed on a map in the expo floor. Do not enter any information that you would not be comfortable to share with the public.
stakeholderSelect.nameHint: Stakeholder name to be included in the final assessment report. This information is not stored.
stakeholderSelect.nameHintExpo: Stakeholder name to be included in the final assessment report and stored in Expo 2025 database.
stakeholderSelect.nameRequired: Stakeholder name is required in Expo mode.
stakeholderSelect.systemPlaceholder: Enter the name of the software system being evaluated...
stakeholderSelect.systemHint: Name of the software system being evaluated. This information is not stored.
stakeholderSelect.systemHintExpo: Name of the software system being evaluated. This information is stored in Expo 2025 database.
stakeholderSelect.userPlaceholder: Enter the name of the user conducting the assessment...
stakeholderSelect.userHint: User name to be included in the final assessment report. This information is not stored.
stakeholderSelect.userHintExpo: User name to be included in the final assessment report and stored in Expo 2025 database.
stakeholderSelect.userRequired: User name is required in Expo mode.
stakeholderSelect.locationPlaceholder: Enter a Country, City or address...
stakeholderSelect.locationHint: Country, city or address. This information is not stored and is useful for collating results in dashboards.
stakeholderSelect.locationHintExpo: Country, city or address. This information is stored in Expo 2025 database used for the map in the expo floor.
stakeholderSelect.locationRequired: Location is required in Expo mode.

kpaSelect.heading: SNOMED Implementation Maturity assessment
kpaSelect.expoKpaInfo: Note: In Expo mode, only the primary KPA is enabled for assessment. Other KPAs are shown for reference but are disabled to keep the assessment brief.

questionFlow.heading: SNOMED Implementation Maturity assessment
questionFlow.errorSelectOption: Please select an option for this question.

results.title: SNOMED Implementation Maturity assessment results
results.expoTitle: SNOMED Implementation Maturity assessment results - Expo 2025 Quick Assessment
results.expoBannerText: Your assessment is ready! Click "Save to Expo 2025" to contribute your results to our collective analysis. This quick assessment focused on the primary KPA for your stakeholder type.
results.maturityLevelText: Based on your responses, the maturity level of the stakeholder is:

admin.subtitle: Manage and review maturity assessment responses
admin.noDataText: No assessments found for the selected event

dashboard.subtitle: Results from the Maturity Assessment Tool

editor.subtitle: Edit stakeholders, KPAs, questions, and options
editor.specSaved: Viewing saved specification (auto-saved to local storage)
editor.subtitleHint: You can use HTML tags like <b> for bold text
editor.emptyStateText: Choose a home item (title, subtitle, flip card), stakeholder, KPA, question, or option to start editing.
